# Addendum A - Loan Origination Credit Policy

## Purpose
Define the benchmark credit-score threshold for Mode A Loan Origination.

## Rule
FICO >= 700 is the standard credit eligibility threshold.

## Classification
- FICO >= 760: preferred
- FICO 700-759: standard approval eligible
- FICO 660-699: escalation / exception review
- FICO < 660: block absent documented exception

## Adverse-action mapping
- AA01: Insufficient credit score for standard approval threshold
